## How to test

<!-- Exact commands / manual steps a reviewer can run to verify. -->

```bash
npm test
npm run build
```

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated and passing (`npm test`)
- [ ] Build is clean (`npm run build`)
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits (`type(scope): summary`)
- [ ] Docs/README updated if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets, `.env`, or build artifacts committed
